form.formComment: Drawn the inside. At the last start finished 4th on March 30 over 450m at Shepparton behind Hatari beaten 8 lengths (25.64) in a Grade 4/5. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Finished sixth (22.84) last time over 390m at Shepparton. Not keen, needs to lift.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (19.56) over 350m at this track. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Recorded a neck win (25.82) in a Grade 5 last time at Ballarat. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Looking to others.

formComments.comment: Recorded a neck win (25.82) in a Grade 5 last time at Ballarat. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.44) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and seven places from 12 starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (19.44) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and seven places from 12 starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors five starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (23.01) at Geelong over 400m. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2 length third (19.59) over 350m at this track. In form and can return to the winners' list.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 425m at Bendigo in a handy (24.27), beating Who She Rules. Strong form emerging from the last run. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 3rd over 400m at Warragul beaten 5 lengths (23.45) behind Got Immunity in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Latest effort finished last on March 22 over 350m at this track behind Michigan beaten 5 lengths (19.36) in a Free For All. Didn't show up last start but give her another chance.
